# Migrating to AuthKit

## Introduction

WorkOS provides a [range of guides](https://workos.com/docs/migrate) to help you migrate your existing integration to AuthKit.

## Migrate from another service

These guides will walk you through the process of moving your users and organizations to WorkOS from another service.

## Migrating an existing WorkOS integration

If you already have an integration with WorkOS (for example, using the [standalone API](https://workos.com/docs/sso) to provide SSO to your customers), you can migrate to AuthKit and take advantage of all of the features it provides by following [this guide](https://workos.com/docs/migrate-standalone-sso).
